summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Trust Section. All 10 features verified and PASSED. Trust section appears exactly ONCE on homepage (data-testid='trust-section'), positioned correctly after hero. All styling requirements met: Google icon has white circle background with gold stars, other metrics have beige/gold circular backgrounds (52px), philosophy titles use Cinzel small-caps, descriptions use italic Cormorant Garamond, no card borders/shadows. Testimonial rotation with 4 navigation dots works correctly.
seed_data_creation: None required - uses DEFAULT_TRUST_CARDS and DEFAULT_PHILOSOPHY_CARDS fallbacks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Section is fully functional with all styling requirements met. TextTestimonialsStrip.jsx is the sole renderer of the trust section (TrustSection.jsx is hidden via DB visible=false).

All 5 metric items found with correct values: ['5.0', '97%', '100%', '100%', '100%']

Computed style: fontVariant='small-caps', fontVariantCaps='small-caps', fontFamily='Cinzel, serif'
Computed style: fontStyle='italic', fontFamily='Cormorant Garamond, Georgia, serif'

features_tested.details: All 10 cards (5 metric + 5 philosophy) verified: no borders or box-shadows on card containers
Found 4 navigation dots. Clicking dot 2 changed quote from 'The healing sessions...' to 'Every session feels...'
